mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), due_date) = 0 THEN 'today_due' WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), due_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 3 THEN 'overdue_1_3' WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), due_date) BETWEEN 4 AND 7 THEN 'overdue_4_7' WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), due_date) BETWEEN 8 AND 14 THEN 'overdue_8_14' ELSE 'overdue_gt_14' END AS `key`, SUM(unpaid_amount) AS amount FROM lease_bill WHERE valid = 1 AND deleted = 0 AND unpaid_amount > 0 AND pay_status IN (0, 1) AND due_date IS NOT NULL AND due_date <= CURDATE() GROUP BY CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), due_date) = 0 THEN 'today_due' WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), due_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 3 THEN 'overdue_1_3' WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), due_date) BETWEEN 4 AND 7 THEN 'overdue_4_7' WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), due_date) BETWEEN 8 AND 14 THEN 'overdue_8_14' ELSE 'overdue_gt_14' END
